headline: CSX marks unique status with DC 250 rail event
summary: CSX rolled out its U.S. 250th commemorative locomotives in Washington where it claims the title as the sole Class I freight railroad. The post CSX marks unique status with DC 250 rail event appeared first on FreightWaves.
